---
title: "Georgia"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev = "ragg_png"
)
```

TBD.

```{r}
library(shiny)

tabsetPanel(
  id = "tabsetpanel",
  tabPanel("Tab 1",
    "This is the content for tab 1."
  ),
  tabPanel("Tab 2",
    "This is the content for tab 2."
  )
)
```
